item.title: POV: The friend with no filter
item.description: That one friend who says whatever pops into their head, no matter the moment. A very relatable kind of chaos.

media:content.media:title: POV: The friend with no filter
media:content.media:description: That one friend who says whatever pops into their head, no matter the moment. A very relatable kind of chaos.

item.title: Apologizing right after saying it
item.description: That moment when the filter is gone and the apology comes immediately after. A very relatable little slip-up.

media:content.media:title: Apologizing right after saying it
media:content.media:description: That moment when the filter is gone and the apology comes immediately after. A very relatable little slip-up.

item.title: Why am I so quiet now?
item.description: Fine, I’m literally never speaking again… and then they ask why I’m so quiet. A very familiar moment.

media:content.media:title: Why am I so quiet now?
media:content.media:description: Fine, I’m literally never speaking again… and then they ask why I’m so quiet. A very familiar moment.

item.title: One slip of the tongue, forever remembered
item.description: One small slip of the tongue and now it’s apparently permanent. The kind of thing friends will bring up forever.

media:content.media:title: One slip of the tongue, forever remembered
media:content.media:description: One small slip of the tongue and now it’s apparently permanent. The kind of thing friends will bring up forever.
